news.headline: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. reported fourth quarter net income of $2.65 million ($0.57/share) and $10.40 million ($2.28/share) for full year 2024.
news.summary: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc., based in Coldwater, Michigan, revealed that in the fourth quarter of 2025, they achieved a net income of $2,650,000 equating to $0.57 per share, showcasing growth from $2,437,000 or $0.54 per share in the fourth quarter of 2023. For the entire year of 2024, they reported earnings of $10,402,000 or $2.28 per share, as opposed to the previous year's $10,905,000 or $2.40 per share.

news.headline: Survey by InsureMyTrip shows 79% travelers fear illness/injury abroad, but only 41% know health insurance coverage.
news.summary: In a survey conducted by InsureMyTrip in Warwick, Rhode Island on February 14, 2025, it was found that there is a significant disparity in travel preparedness among international travelers. The survey indicated that 79% of travelers fear falling ill or getting injured while abroad. Surprisingly, only 41% of travelers were aware of whether their...

news.headline: El Salvador's President Bukele met Michael Saylor to discuss Bitcoin adoption; details undisclosed.
news.summary: El Presidente de El Salvador, Nayib Bukele, se reunió el jueves en el palacio presidencial del país con el cofundador de MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), Michael Saylor, según la Oficina Nacional de Bitcoin del país. Aunque no se revelaron detalles específicos de su conversación, el encuentro unió a dos de los partidarios más elocuentes de Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) en un momento en que El Salvador está ajustando sus políticas de criptomonedas. Bukele compartió una foto de la cena en redes sociales, y la Oficina Nacional de Bitcoin luego publicó imágenes adicionales. Saylor también tuiteó fotos del encuentro, indicando que la discusión se centró en cómo El Salvador podría beneficiarse y acelerar la "adopción global de Bitcoin". Al mismo tiempo, El Salvador añadió un Bitcoin a su reserva ... El contenido completo está disponible en Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TCRC-MWED approves new 4-year agreement with CPKC, representing engineering employees in Canada.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on February 14, 2025, Canadian Pacific Kansas City announced that the Teamsters Canada Rail Conference Maintenance of Way Employees Division, which represents engineering service workers in Canada, has approved a new four-year agreement. Canadian Pacific Kansas City is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CP) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CP) under the symbol CPKC.

news.headline: Canadian bank suggests negative view on Bitcoin; Recent data shows $647 million outflows from Bitcoin ETFs in four days.
news.summary: Farside Investors have reported that Bitcoin ETFs witnessed outflows exceeding $647 million over the course of four days marked by continuous capital flight.

news.headline: Vance criticizes Europe for not meeting democratic standards.
EU's Kallas: Listening to Vance speech was as if they are trying to pick a fight with us.
TikTok is back on Google and Apple app stores after being downloaded over 2 billion times.
Wind Farms Operators Database with 2482 entries worldwide now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A global database called "Wind Farms Operators Database" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's services. This database comprises 2482 entries of wind farms operators from around the world. Information provided includes the portfolio number of wind farms, total power, contact details such as address, phone, fax, corporate mail address, and website. The database is available in Excel or .CSV file format. For further details on this database, you can visit the following link: https://www.researchandmarkets.com/r/47e8g8. ResearchAndMarkets.com is the provider of this database.

news.headline: Zoomcar reports record high contribution profit of $1.28 million in fiscal Q3, 2024, with bookings up 19% from previous year. Marketing costs decreased by 80%, and adjusted EBITDA loss decreased significantly.CEO Hiroshi Nishijima highlights doubled repeat users along with notable improvements in high-quality host retention rates and customer experience. Active high-quality cars increased by 24% reflecting improved host retention.
news.summary: Zoomcar, the car-sharing marketplace in India, reported its fiscal Q3 2024 results with a significant upsurge in several key metrics. The company saw a 19% increase in bookings compared to the previous year, totaling 103,599 bookings. Contribution profit noted a record high of $1.28 million, representing 52% of revenue, a substantial improvement from the previous quarter's $1.21 million. Repeat user rates doubled, witnessing a 2.0x increase in bookings. The company's cost optimization initiatives resulted in a 28% reduction in cost of revenue, a 41% reduction in technology expenses, and an 80% decrease in marketing costs. Adjusted EBITDA loss decreased from $10.17 million to $3.15 million. Active high-quality cars also soared by 24% from 5,830 to 7,247, showcasing an improvement in host retention rates. Zoomcar's ongoing commitment to enhance customer experience reflected in average guest trip ratings rising from 4.16 to 4.70. CEO Hiroshi Nishijima attributed these successes to improvements in customer experience and increased supply. The company is focused on further growth and optimization, exemplified by the positive trend in financial performance.

news.headline: C.A.R.-backed group sues LA over rezoning commitments. Californians for Homeownership files lawsuit to address housing crisis.
news.summary: A nonprofit group called Californians for Homeownership, backed by the CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION OF REALTORS® (C.A.R.), has initiated legal action in Los Angeles on Feb. 14, 2025. This organization, focused on tackling California's housing crisis through legal means, filed a lawsuit against a certain party.

Stock market indexes show little movement post weak retail sales; GameStop surges on Bitcoin news.
news.summary: In today's stock market, small caps surged ahead as retail sales figures for January fell short of expectations. Overall, the indexes showed minimal movement, with a notable increase seen in GameStop's stock following news related to Bitcoin.

news.headline: Hong Kong dealmakers ready for action in lunar new year
JM Search enhances executive recruitment team for Consumer sector growth. Focus on hiring leaders for evolving landscape.
news.summary: An executive search firm, JM Search, based in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, has recently increased its team specialized in recruiting executives for Consumer businesses. The firm is a top choice for private equity and growth-oriented organizations and is seeing significant expansion in the consumer goods sector. This growth highlights the need for skilled leaders to manage the changing industry dynamics. JM Search's focus includes areas such as Consumer Products, Food & Beverage, and Consumer Digital.

news.headline: Todd Savage appointed as Executive Managing Director of Office Investment Sales at Cushman & Wakefield in Dallas.
news.summary: In Dallas, a renowned real estate services firm, Cushman & Wakefield, recently welcomed Todd Savage as the Executive Managing Director of Office Investment Sales. This strategic addition is set to enhance their expertise in this sector, indicating a focus on boosting performance and expanding their reach. The move signals a significant investment in talent as they aim to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the market. Savage's role will involve overseeing office investment sales operations, leveraging his experience and insights to drive growth and achieve remarkable results. This development underscores Cushman & Wakefield's commitment to strengthening their position in the industry.

news.headline: THEON exceeds FY 2024 targets, expects significant growth in FY 2025.
LP Building Solutions raises quarterly dividend to $0.28 per share, 8% increase for common stockholders.
news.summary: LP Building Solutions in Nashville, Tennessee, has raised its quarterly cash dividend for common stockholders by 8%, now totaling $0.28 per share.

news.headline: Bioretec gets CE Mark for RemeOs™ Trauma Screw Product Group, expanding with over 200 products.
news.summary: A company based in Tampere, Finland, Bioretec Ltd., known for its absorbable orthopedic implants, has recently made significant progress by obtaining CE mark approval for its RemeOs™ Trauma Screw product line. This achievement signifies a crucial milestone for Bioretec, enabling them to market this product across Europe. The CE mark indicates that the product meets the necessary regulatory requirements for safety, health, and environmental protection standards. This development opens up new opportunities for Bioretec, allowing them to expand their market reach and offer innovative solutions to orthopedic trauma patients.

news.headline: DomainTools joins Microsoft Copilot for Security Partner Ecosystem; Global leader in cyber threat intelligence to contribute expertise.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, DomainTools, a top provider of domain and DNS cyber threat intelligence, revealed its acceptance into the Microsoft Copilot for Security Partner Ecosystem. Their selection was a result of their demonstrated expertise in collaboration with Microsoft.

news.headline: Verdek appoints Gene Irwin as Manager of GSA/DOD Fleet to expand EV charging solutions, sustainability initiatives.
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut on February 14, 2025, Verdek LLC, a prominent company specializing in EV charging solutions and sustainability efforts, welcomed Gene Irwin as the new Manager of GSA/DoD Fleet. With a strong background in business and a dedication to promoting green practices, Gene's addition to the team highlights Verdek's commitment to environmental initiatives.

news.headline: Robert Half and its subsidiary Protiviti named one of America's Best Large Employers in 2025 by Forbes based on independent survey.
news.summary: A company based in Menlo Park, California, Robert Half (NYSE: RHI), along with its subsidiary Protiviti®, has been recognized by Forbes as one of America's Best Large Employers 2025. This global talent solutions and consulting firm received this accolade based on an independent survey.

news.headline: Enterprise data storage market to grow by USD 12.5 billion (CAGR 4.5%) from 2025-2029, driven by cloud app adoption & AI.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends projects significant growth in the enterprise data storage market. It is expected to increase by USD 12.5 billion from 2025 to 2029. The growth is forecasted to progress at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.5% during this period.

news.headline: CESUR Mining offers cloud mining services, serving 9 million members, with over 100 farms, 500,000 machines, contributing 3.8% of Bitcoin's power.
news.summary: London, UK - Feb. 14, 2025 - CESUR Mining, a renowned cloud mining leader, has expanded its services to enhance the convenience, efficiency, and profitability of cloud mining for global users. Established in October 2018, CESUR Mining has experienced substantial growth, now serving over 9 million members globally and contributing around 3.8% of Bitcoin's total computing power. The platform boasts a robust infrastructure comprising over 100 mining farms and 500,000 high-performance mining machines to ensure the security, reliability, and sustainability of cloud mining operations. CESUR Mining utilizes cutting-edge mining hardware like Bitmain, Antminer, and Jueneng Combination Miner to guarantee optimal performance and consistent returns. Operating as a legally registered entity in the United Kingdom, the company emphasizes transparency in its practices to provide users with a seamless cloud mining experience.
